//schema: kols[].id = 인물 식별자 (lowercase, unique). addresses = 해당 인물의 모든 지갑 (본/부/벡터). tier = S/A/B. is_active=false 는 비활성.
//workflow: 월 1회 재검증 — recent_30d_pnl_sol / recent_30d_5x_count 업데이트. PnL 음수 3개월 연속 시 is_active=false 제안.

decu. Added from 2026-04-25 KOL research: high-priority active discovery wallet; public Kolscan/OKX cross-check indicates profitable low-cap, small-ticket behavior. Use as signal source, not blind copy.
clukz. Added from 2026-04-25 KOL research: selective low-cap tail-catcher; public OKX/Kolscan evidence includes recent multi-bagger closed position. High-value discovery signal.
West @ratwizardx. Added from 2026-04-25 KOL research: active low-cap grinder/discovery wallet. Address existence cross-checked; keep active but monitor per-wallet precision before tier S.
theo. Added from 2026-04-25 KOL research: strong discovery wallet with lower win-rate / high-tail profile. Latency-sensitive; use primarily for token discovery and multi-KOL confirmation.
Scharo. Added from 2026-04-25 KOL research: medium-speed low-cap wallet with reported multi-bagger history. Public performance cross-check weaker than decu/clukz; monitor precision.

Gdaqp3. Reactivated from secondary_unverified_pool after 2026-04-26 research: public OKX/GMGN-style sources indicate large total PnL and active short-horizon low/mid-cap rotation. Keep active but monitor precision; high-turnover profile may be signal source more than blind copy.
BfLg. Added from 2026-04-26 KOL research: reported 30d +201.13 SOL, 90d +204.39 SOL, 84.27% win rate, avg hold ~13d, and visible 5x+ tail trades. Treat as Copy Core candidate; reverify weekly.
2Ekawy. Added from 2026-04-26 KOL research: reported 30d +20.57 SOL, 90d +53.45 SOL, 70.85% win rate, 480 trades, avg hold ~13h. Copy Core candidate with moderate turnover.
DzFk. Added from 2026-04-26 KOL research: reported 30d +11.52 SOL, 90d +107.78 SOL, 72.29% win rate, 671 trades, avg hold ~9d. Copy Core candidate; monitor concentration and latency sensitivity.
Cupsey benchmark. High-frequency reference wallet; kept inactive in Option 5 DB to avoid noisy direct KOL hunter triggers. Existing cupsey lane remains separate benchmark.
Cented benchmark. Public sources describe high-frequency/bot-like launch behavior; useful as reference, not active canary signal until a benchmark-only observer exists.
Domy @domyxbt. Inactive watch candidate from 2026-04-25 KOL research; Orb confirms individual address, but keep inactive until 30d realized PnL / tail evidence is reverified.
Sheep. Inactive watch candidate from 2026-04-25 KOL research; tail-winner potential but role/longer-term verification is weaker. Activate only after next monthly review.

FTg1. Split from secondary_unverified_pool after 2026-04-26 research. Historical smart-wallet evidence and OKX total PnL look strong, but recent activity quality is weaker; keep inactive watch until recent 30d/90d edge is reconstructed.
GwyG. Inactive watch candidate from 2026-04-26 research: reported GMGN-style high net PnL with multi-week persistence. Keep inactive until bot/operator risk and copyability are verified.
2btYi. Inactive watch candidate from 2026-04-26 research: large reported net PnL but higher whale/operator risk. Do not activate until persistence and copyability are verified.
91e6. Inactive watch candidate from 2026-04-26 research: high reported PnL/trade count but likely high-frequency profile. Keep out of active KOL trigger set.
Project/treasury-like wallet, not a KOL. Preserved inactive until operator confirms use as event wallet.
Project/foundation wallet from old group. Preserved inactive.
솔하나 from old group. Inactive until reverified.
Unnamed/unverified secondary-list wallets. Kept inactive to avoid polluting KOL discovery.
